From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 15:29 EST
Subject: competitive positioning - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - VanArsdel Ltd
Date: 2024-02-21
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Priya (VanArsdel Ltd)

[00:01:15] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is competitive positioning.

[00:07:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:12:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:15:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:20:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:30:00] Priya (VanArsdel Ltd): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:34:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?
